headline: Wynn Resorts Ltd (NASDAQ:WYNN) Beats Q1 Estimates as Revenue and EPS Edge Past Forecasts
summary: Wynn Resorts beat Q1 2026 estimates with $1.25 EPS and $1.86B revenue, up 9.2% YoY. Strong Las Vegas and Macau performance drove the beat, though the stock traded flat post-earnings.

headline: Wynn Resorts, Limited Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: LAS VEGAS, May 7, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Wynn Resorts, Limited today reported financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.Operating revenues were $1.86 billion for the first quarter...
